security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: http:; media-src 'self' blob: data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-src 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first music player with YouTube search, streaming and downloads.
bundle.longDescription: A native local-first music player: scan local folders, search and stream from YouTube (yt-dlp), download tracks as mp3, and manage playlists with custom covers. Includes MPRIS and Discord Rich Presence.
